name: How much does it cost to hire a lawyer for a work back injury?
description: Nothing upfront. We work on a contingency fee basis, meaning we only get paid a percentage of the settlement we secure for you. If you don't win, you don't pay

mainEntity.name: How much does it cost to hire a lawyer for a work back injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Nothing upfront. We work on a contingency fee basis, meaning we only get paid a percentage of the settlement we secure for you. If you don't win, you don't pay attorney fees.
